meta.title: Welcome to Your Guitar
meta.subtitle: Get to know your guitar and get comfortable holding it.

learningOutcomes: Recognize the main parts of your guitar
Hold your guitar in a relaxed, comfortable position

steps.title: Meet your guitar
steps.body: This is your guitar. In this lesson you will learn what it is made of and how to hold it so it feels natural.

steps.title: Find your playing posture
steps.body: Sit on the front edge of your chair with both feet on the floor. Rest the guitar on your leg and keep your shoulders relaxed.

steps.title: Make your first sounds
steps.body: Gently pluck one string with your picking hand. Let it ring out and listen to the sound. Try this on a few strings.

steps.title: You and your guitar
steps.body: If you can name a few parts of your guitar and hold it comfortably, you are ready for the next lesson.

steps.title: 🎵 Amazing work!
steps.body: You just completed your first guitar lesson! 🎸 You're on your way to becoming a great musician. Remember: every expert was once a beginner, and you've taken that first brave step. Keep practicing, stay curious, and most importantly - have fun making music! 🌟
